name: Triple Chocolate Pudding Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease an 8-inch square baking pan.
3. In a medium bowl, combine the biscuit baking mix, sugar, and cocoa. Stir in 1/2 cup milk, butter, 1/4 cup chocolate topping, and vanilla until well blended.
4. Stir in 1/2 cup chocolate chips; spread evenly in the prepared pan.
5. In a small bowl, combine the remaining 1/4 cup milk, remaining 1/2 cup chocolate topping, and hot water.
6. Pour the liquid mixture carefully over the top of the batter in the pan. Do not stir.
7. Sprinkle the remaining 1/2 cup chocolate chips over the surface.
8. Bake for 40-45 minutes or until the center is set and the cake begins to pull away from the sides of the pan.
9. Allow to stand for 15 minutes, then turn off the oven heat.
10. Using a spatula, spoon the pudding into dessert dishes, spooning some pudding from the bottom of the pan over the top.
11. Serve warm; garnish with whipped topping if desired. Refrigerate leftovers.
